description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named msys2 that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a windows-latest job with read permission to repository contents, and a matrix strategy to run on both MINGW32 and MINGW64. For each job, check out the repository, set up ccache, install msys2 with various packages, upgrade fonttools with pip, build with meson and ninja, and run tests with meson test.
